RevengersWrap.Name: Revenger's Wrap
RevengersWrap.Hint: Enable "Marked for Revenge" tracking and bonus effects for the wearer of a Revenger's Wrap.

BloodboundBand.Name: Bloodbound Band
BloodboundBand.Hint: Enable unpreventable damage shared between two or more wearers of a Bloodbound Band.

ColorCloaks.Name: Color Cloaks
ColorCloaks.Hint: Enable the Color Cloaks' trigger reminders. (Red = reduce fire damage to 0, Blue = shift equal to level, Yellow = bonus damage equal to level on next attack)

OverlayVisualization.Name: Elevation Overlay
OverlayVisualization.Hint: Enable a visual overlay on the canvas to indicate change in elevation of tiles set by this module.

OverlayStyle.Name: Overlay Mode
OverlayStyle.Hint: Choose which style of visualization to use.

NumberOverlay.Name: Number Overlay
NumberOverlay.Hint: Enable an additional numerical overlay on the canvas to indicate the elevation of tiles.

NumberOverlayColor.Name: Add Color to Number Overlay
NumberOverlayColor.Hint: Enable colorful numbers when the number overlay is enabled. if disabled, numbers will be black.
